extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIC attacked 6km from summit on Col de Turini, dropped everyone except MARTINEZ who marked wheels, then out-kicked him at 200m to go
tactical_patterns: INEOS split leadership between A.Yates and Martinez backfired; A.Yates attacked 7km out but Martinez marked S.Yates instead of following teammate
ROGLIC waited until 6km despite Dennis setting tempo, using teammate work to avoid showing cards early on 15km climb
QUINTANA repeatedly distanced then clawed back during tactical stalemate, exploiting lack of cooperation between MARTINEZ/S.YATES final 2km
ALMEIDA bridged late after poor positioning earlier, suggesting BikeExchange allowed initial selection rather than mechanicals

rider_signals.YATES Adam: negative: attacking at 7km on 15km climb revealed poor pacing judgment, caught quickly and distanced before finish
rider_signals.MARTINEZ Danny: negative: marked rivals instead of following Yates teammate, then failed to beat Roglic in sprint despite fresh legs
rider_signals.JORGENSEN Mateo: negative: lost white jersey by dropping early on 7.3% gradient, significantly weaker than expected pre-race form
rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: bridged to Roglic group after brother dropped him, more diesel strength than A.Yates' explosive weakness
rider_signals.HAIG Jack: positive: survived in Roglic's move at 6km despite not being animated, strong positioning for 20-second group
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: neutral: repeatedly gapped but recovered suggests tactical hesitation from others rather than Quintana strength
rider_signals.ALMEIDA Joao: positive: recovered from poor early-week positioning to bridge in final kilometers, better form than GC standing suggested
